productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Brown casual Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and an absolute comfort to the feet, it's a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team this with chinos and simple shirts for that cool, casual look. Upper Leather upper for style and comfort Long tongue for easy wear Stitch detailing for style and durability Internal collar lacing in leather for enhanced support to the collar Long collar for comfortable insertion and removal of foot Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Complete inner nubuck lining for breathable comfort Leather footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protection Brand badge on the heel Outsole Durable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves on the toe and back heel region, and with wave pattern lugs throughout for maximum grip and traction shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
